title: Sinister Doll
overview: A teenager, Pelangi, chances upon a banana tree plantation that is guarded by a mysterious old man. Apart from finding out that a young girl was buried with her favorite doll in this banana plantation decades ago, Pelangi also uncovers a horrifying secret about her death.
